name: Baby Sized Easter Egg Centers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the sweetened condensed milk, powdered sugar, butter, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Form the mixture into small balls, approximately 100 in total or as tiny egg shapes desired.
3. Optionally, dip the balls in chocolate coating or colored coating.
4. These can be used as Candy Easter Egg Centers or as a regular creamy center for making Bon Bons.
5. Additional flavoring or coloring may be added to the recipe if desired.
